scripts.build:wasm: cd .. && PATH=$(dirname $(rustup which rustc)):$PATH cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --features wasm --lib && wasm-bindgen target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/macchk.wasm --target web --out-dir demo/src/pkg --out-name macchk
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run typecheck && rsbuild build
